titleStmt.title: SII 16.106: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 106. (A.R. No. 59 of 1912.) MALLINĀYANIPALLI, DHARMAVARAM TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in the village.
The record is dated Śaka 1455, Vijaya, Kārtika śu. 12, Wednesday, Utthānadvādaśi, corresponding to 1533 A.D., October 29, Wednesday, °80.

It registers the gift of some wet lands constituted into a hamlet called Mallapanāyanipalli in Dharmavaram to God Maṇḍem Nārasiṁhadēva, who was pleased to manifest himself in a field near Dharmavaram, by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Salakarāju China Tirumalayyadēva-mahārāju for the merit of his parents Salakarāju and Tipājamma. The donor is said to have obtained Dharmavaram as nāyṅkara from the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatē rāmānujāyanamaḥ . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivā
hana śakavaruṣaṁbulagunaṭṭi 1455 Agunaṭi vijaya saṁva
tsara kā¨rtika śu 12 bu lū śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara
śrīvīrapratāpa śrī Acyutarāyamahārāyalu vajrasiṁhvāsa
nārūḍhuṁḍayi pruthvīsāṁmrājyaṁ sēyucuṁḍaṁgānu śrīma(ṁ)
nmamahāmaṁḍalēśvara salakarāju cinatirumalayyadēvamahā
rājulu tathātithi vuddhānadvādasi puṁṇyakālamaṁdu dhaṁ¨rmava
raṁ polaṁlōnu pratyakṣamai veṁcāyanavadhariṁcina maṁḍeṁ nāra
siṁhvadēvaraku Āragiṁpu Amṛtapaḷaku Acyutarāyamahā rā
yalu tamaku nāyaṁkarānakuṁ pāliṁpa navadhariṁcina dhaṁ¨rmavaraṁpolaṁ
lōnu kaṭipolaṁcēsi kaṭiṁcina mallapanāyanipallenu dhaṁ¨rmavaraṁ ceruU
naḍimi tūmukālvanu pāre paṁtapunīruṁnu nīḷaku dī¨rcina kālvakiṁdanu paṁḍē va
rimaḍiṁni tama taṁḍri saḷakarājugārikiṁnni tama talli tipājaṁmagārikiṁni pu
ṁṇyaṁgānu sahiraṁṇōdakadānadhārāpū¨rvakamugānu śrī narasiṁhā
¨rpaṇaṁgānu dhāravōsi yistimi . śrīma(ṁ)nmahāmaṁḍalēśvara salakarāju
pina tirumalayyadēvamahārājulu dha¨rmavaraṁ polaṁlō pratyakṣamai
vēṁcēya navadhariṁcina maṁḍeṁ śrīnarasiṁhadēvuniki dha¨rmavaraṁ polaṁlōnu
kaṭivolaṁcēsi kaṭṭina malapanāyanipallenu dha¨rmavaraṁceruvu naḍimitūmukālva
nu pāre paṁtapunīruṁnnū yī nīruku dī¨rcina kālvakiṁdanu paṁḍe varimaḍiṁni
Ācaṁdrā¨rkamugānu dhāravōsi yistimi . śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara sala
karāju cina tirumalayadēvamahārājulu daṁ¨rmavara polaṁlōna
pratyakṣamayi veṁcāyanavadhariṁcina maṁḍeṁ śrīnarasiṁhadēvuni The continuation is lost.
Digital edition of SII 16.106 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
